attributes.title: PostgreSQL — log stream
attributes.description: Postgres JSON logs with startup noise and duration-only lines filtered out.

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"query":{"query":"service: exercises-postgres and not message: statement* and not message: duration* and not message: (*Skipping* or *redirecting* or *Future* or *ending*log*output* or *stderr* or *received*fast*shutdown* or *aborting*active*transactions* or *database*system*shut*down* or *shutting*down* or *starting*PostgreSQL*)","language":"kuery"},"filter":[],"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index"}
